name: Shinelong Automotive Lightweight Application Limited
summary: Shinelong Automotive Lightweight Application Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells precision moulds in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers automotive and electrical appliance moulds, including hot-pressing, hydroforming, automotive injection, bicolour injection, and TV injection moulds; and parts processing services. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Kunshan, China. Shinelong Automotive Lightweight Application Limited is a subsidiary of Shine Art International Limited.
